description: Iterative working manifest for ladder capture workflows.

entries.description: Full horizontal wire 1-row — wire flag encoding
Full wire + NOP 1-row — AF column encoding
Short plain comment on empty 1-row rung
Native capture of empty 1-row rung with comment Hello world
Comment from native empty donor base
Pure scaffold + comment + 0x65 flag, no donor, no header seed
Partial horizontal wires spread across 3 rows
Vertical pass-through tokens on non-A columns across rows
Mixed multi-row topology with T junctions and wire segments
NOP only on row 0 of a 3-row rung
NOP present on multiple rows of a 4-row rung
entries.verify_notes: We learned that when there are multiple 'NOP' pasted, Click renders only the last one, the two on the first two rungs are small '.' dots. Our payload is correct, and I verified that doing the same thing manually resulted in the same effect. We should just guard against multiple NOP's.

entries.description: NOP on row 0 with wire topology on lower rows
Single character comment on empty 1-row rung
Medium length comment (100 chars) on empty 1-row rung
Maximum length comment (1400 bytes) on empty 1-row rung
Comment with cp1252 special characters on empty 1-row rung
All 31 condition columns filled with horizontal wire
Vertical wire only in column B across multiple rows
T junction in last condition column AE with continuation below
Native capture: comment + NOP, no wires
Native capture: comment + full wire + NOP
Native capture: comment + partial wire with T-junction
Regression baseline: empty 1-row rung, no comment
Regression baseline: full wire 1-row rung, no comment
Regression baseline: NOP-only 1-row rung, no comment
Regression baseline: full wire + NOP 1-row rung, no comment
Regression baseline: empty 2-row rung, no comment
Native comment+partial-wire: 'Partial wires' text, dash on B and D, 1-row
Native comment+fullwire (all 31 cols dashed) to confirm 0x67 family flag
Native comment+NOP-only (no wires) to check family flag (0x65 expected)
Single char 'A' comment, empty row, for flag mapping
Single char 'B' comment, empty row, for flag mapping
Single char 'C' comment, empty row, for flag mapping
Two char 'AB' comment, empty row, for flag mapping
'Test' comment, empty row, for flag mapping
100 x chars comment, empty row, for flag mapping (regression-100char text)
Comment-only (no wires, no NOP) with 0x5A flag
Comment + sparse wires (dash B and D) with 0x5A flag
Full wire + NOP (no comment) - regression baseline
Comment + full wire + NOP with 0x5A flag
Max 1400 char comment + sparse wires (B,D) + NOP — stress test
Native 2-row comment + empty grid (no wires, no NOP)
Native 2-row comment + full wire on row 0, sparse horizontal (B,D) on row 1
2-row comment + full wire row0 + NOP row0, empty row1
3-row comment + full wire row0 + NOP row2
entries.verify_notes: Pasted 2 rows, but missing 3rd with NOP

entries.description: 2-row comment, T at col C on row 0 with full wire, dash at C on row 1. Ground truth for down flags in phase-A/cont records.
2-row comment, NOP on row 1 only, no wires. Ground truth for NOP in cont records.
2-row comment, sparse wire at B and D on both rows, no NOP
3-row comment, wire B on rows 1 and 2
2-row wire no comment, full wire row 0, sparse row 1
1-row comment, empty grid, verify current encoder
1-row comment, full wire all 31 cols, verify current encoder
1-row comment, NOP only, verify current encoder
1-row comment, dash at B and D, verify current encoder
2-row comment, empty grid, control (should still pass)
Native fullwire file-backed test (known-good native binary)
2-row comment, wire at col A on both rows
3-row comment, wire at B and D on rows 1+2
3-row comment, full wire row 0, partial rows 1+2
5-row comment, partial wire rows 0-3, empty row 4
9-row comment, partial wire rows 0-7, empty row 8
13-row comment, partial wire rows 0-11, empty row 12
32-row comment, partial wire rows 0-30, empty row 31
